ns:xqmap.xqmapTemplate: declare variable $ALLOCMAP := map:merge(for $q in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/slicing:slicing/slicing:slice[slicing:slice-owner/text()='SLICING_OWNER']/slicing:resource-allocation/slicing:private-and-read-only-resource return map:entry( $q/slicing:name/text(), $q/slicing:private-resource-name/text()));

declare variable $CP :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/if:interfaces/if:interface[if:type='bbf-xponift:channel-pair'] return map:entry ( string($p/if:name),map:merge ( ( map:entry('name',string($p/if:name)), map:entry('channel-group-ref',string($p/bbf-xpon:channel-pair/bbf-xpon:channel-group-ref)), map:entry('channel-pair-type',string($p/bbf-xpon:channel-pair/bbf-xpon:channel-pair-type)) ) ) ) );

declare variable $SCG :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/if:interfaces/if:interface[if:type='bbf-xponift:channel-partition'] return map:entry ( string($p/if:name),map:merge ( ( map:entry('name',string($p/if:name)), map:entry('scheduler-node', map:merge(for $sn in $p/bbf-qos-tm:tm-root/bbf-qos-sched:scheduler-node return map:entry( string($sn/bbf-qos-sched:name), map:merge(( map:entry('queue-bac-names', distinct-values(for $queue in $sn/bbf-qos-sched:queue where exists($queue/bbf-qos-sched:bac-name) return string($queue/bbf-qos-sched:bac-name))), map:entry('local-queue-ids', for $queue in $sn/bbf-qos-sched:queue return number($queue/bbf-qos-sched:local-queue-id)), map:entry('child-scheduler-nodes', for $cname in $sn/bbf-qos-sched:child-scheduler-nodes/bbf-qos-sched:name return string($cname)) ))))), map:entry('channel-group-ref',string($p/bbf-xpon:channel-partition/bbf-xpon:channel-group-ref)), map:entry('channel-pair-type',string($p/bbf-xpon:channel-partition/bbf-xpon:channel-partition-index)) ) ) ) );
declare variable $SN2SCG :=map:merge(( for $scgname in map:keys($SCG) for $snname in map:keys($SCG($scgname)('scheduler-node')) return map:entry($snname,$scgname)), map{'duplicates':'combine'});

declare variable $CT :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/if:interfaces/if:interface[if:type='bbf-xponift:channel-termination'] return map:entry ( string($p/if:name),map:merge ( ( map:entry('name',string($p/if:name)),map:entry('channel-pair-ref',string($p/bbf-xpon:channel-termination/bbf-xpon:channel-pair-ref)) ) ) ) );

declare variable $VANI :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/if:interfaces/if:interface[if:type='bbf-xponift:v-ani'] return map:entry ( string($p/if:name), map:merge ( ( map:entry('name',string($p/if:name)), map:entry('preferred-channel-pair',string($p/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:preferred-channel-pair)), map:entry('protection-channel-pair',string($p/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:protection-channel-pair)), map:entry('channel-group-ref',$CP($p/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:preferred-channel-pair)('channel-group-ref') ), map:entry('channel-pair-type',$CP($p/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:preferred-channel-pair)('channel-pair-type') ), map:entry('channel-partition', $p/bbf-xponvani:v-ani/bbf-xponvani:channel-partition/text()) ) ) ) );

declare variable $TCONT :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-xpongemtcont:xpongemtcont/bbf-xpongemtcont:tconts/bbf-xpongemtcont:tcont return map:entry(string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:name),map:merge((map:entry('name', string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:name)),map:entry('alloc-id', string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:alloc-id)),map:entry('interface-reference', string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:interface-reference)), map:entry('tdp', string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:traffic-descriptor-profile-ref)), map:entry('jitter-tolerance', number(bbf-xpongemtcont:xpongemtcont/bbf-xpongemtcont:traffic-descriptor-profiles/bbf-xpongemtcont:traffic-descriptor-profile[bbf-xpongemtcont:name=$p/bbf-xpongemtcont:traffic-descriptor-profile-ref]/nokia-sdan-traffic-descriptor-profile-aug:jitter-tolerance))))));
declare variable $CP2CT :=map:merge( (for $p in map:keys($CT) return map:entry ( $CT($p)('channel-pair-ref'), $p ) ),map{'duplicates':'reject'});

declare variable $TCINCT := map:merge( ( for $tcont in map:keys($TCONT) let $vani:=$TCONT($tcont)('interface-reference') let $cp:=$VANI($vani)('preferred-channel-pair') let $ct:=$CP2CT($cp) return map:entry($ct,1) ) ,map{'duplicates':'combine'} );

declare variable $VENET :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/if:interfaces/if:interface[if:type='bbf-xponift:olt-v-enet'] return map:entry ( string($p/if:name), map:merge (( map:entry('name', string($p/if:name)), map:entry('lower-layer-interface', string($p/bbf-xponvani:olt-v-enet/bbf-xponvani:lower-layer-interface))))));

declare variable $VSI :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/if:interfaces/if:interface[if:type='bbfift:vlan-sub-interface'] return map:entry ( string($p/if:name), map:merge ( ( map:entry('name', string($p/if:name)), map:entry('frameproc', string($p/bbf-frameproc:frame-processing-profile-ref/text())), map:entry('interface-usage', string($p/bbf-if-usg:interface-usage/bbf-if-usg:interface-usage)), map:entry('interface', string($p/bbf-subif:subif-lower-layer/bbf-subif:interface)), map:entry('tag-0', number($p/bbf-frameproc:tag-0/bbf-frameproc:vlan-id)), map:entry('scheduler-node-name', string($p/bbf-qos-sched:egress-tm-objects/bbf-qos-sched:scheduler-node-name)), map:entry('egress-qos-policy-profile', string($p/bbf-qos-pol:egress-qos-policy-profile)), map:entry('ingress-qos-policy-profile', string($p/bbf-qos-pol:ingress-qos-policy-profile)) ) ) ) );

declare variable $ITF2VANI :=map:merge( ( ( for $p in map:keys($VENET) return map:entry ( $p, $VENET($p)('lower-layer-interface') ) ), ( for $p in map:keys($VSI) where (map:contains($VENET,$VSI($p)('interface'))) return map:entry ( $p, $VENET($VSI($p)('interface'))('lower-layer-interface') ) ) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});

declare variable $GEMPORT :=map:merge(for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-xpongemtcont:xpongemtcont/bbf-xpongemtcont:gemports/bbf-xpongemtcont:gemport return map:entry ( string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:name), map:merge ( ( map:entry('name', string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:name)), map:entry('itf-ref', string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:interface)), map:entry('gemport-id', string($p/bbf-xpongemtcont:gemport-id)) ) ) ) );
declare variable $CP2VANI :=map:merge( (for $p in map:keys($VANI) return map:entry ( $VANI($p)('preferred-channel-pair'), $p ) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});
declare variable $CPART2VANI :=map:merge( (for $p in map:keys($VANI) return map:entry ( $VANI($p)('channel-partition'), $p ) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});
declare variable $VANI2TCONT :=map:merge( (for $p in map:keys($TCONT) return map:entry ( $TCONT($p)('interface-reference'), $p)),map{'duplicates':'combine'});
declare variable $ITF2GEMPORT :=map:merge( (for $p in map:keys($GEMPORT) return map:entry ( $GEMPORT($p)('itf-ref'), $p)),map{'duplicates':'combine'});
declare variable $VANI2VENET :=map:merge( (for $p in map:keys($VENET) return map:entry ( $VENET($p)('lower-layer-interface'), $p ) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});
declare variable $VENET2VSI :=map:merge( (for $p in map:keys($VSI) return map:entry ( $VSI($p)('interface'), $p ) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});
declare variable $VANI2VSI :=map:merge( ( for $p in map:keys($VANI2VENET) for $venet in $VANI2VENET($p) return map:entry($p,$VENET2VSI($venet )) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});

declare variable $QOSProF :=map:merge( (for $prf in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-qos-pol:qos-policy-profiles/bbf-qos-pol:policy-profile for $policy in $prf/bbf-qos-pol:policy-list return map:entry($prf/bbf-qos-pol:name,$policy/bbf-qos-pol:name) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});

declare variable $QOSPolicyPF :=map:merge( (for $p in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-qos-pol:policies/bbf-qos-pol:policy for $c in $p/bbf-qos-pol:classifiers return map:entry($p/bbf-qos-pol:name,$c/bbf-qos-pol:name) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});

declare variable $QOSClassPF :=map:merge( for $classentry in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-qos-cls:classifiers/bbf-qos-cls:classifier-entry return map:entry ( string($classentry/bbf-qos-cls:name), map:merge (( map:entry('name', string($classentry/bbf-qos-cls:name)), map:entry( 'classifier-action-entry-cfg', map:merge (( for $classaction in $classentry/bbf-qos-cls:classifier-action-entry-cfg return map:entry( string($classaction/bbf-qos-cls:action-type), map:merge (( map:entry('action-type', string($classaction/bbf-qos-cls:action-type)), map:entry('policing-profile', string($classaction/bbf-qos-plc:policing/bbf-qos-plc:policing-profile)) )) ) )) ) )) ) );

declare variable $QOSPolicingPF :=map:merge( for $pf in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-qos-plc:policing-profiles/bbf-qos-plc:policing-profile return map:entry ( string($pf/bbf-qos-plc:name), map:merge (( map:entry('name', string($pf/bbf-qos-plc:name)), map:entry('scope', string($pf/bbf-qos-plc:scope)), map:entry('cir', ($pf/*/bbf-qos-plc:cir)) )) ) );

declare variable $QOSPF2PolicingPF :=map:merge( ( for $p in map:keys($QOSProF) let $SumVsiPolicingCir:=0+sum( for $POLICY_LIST in $QOSProF($p) for $CLASSIFIER in $QOSPolicyPF($POLICY_LIST) where map:contains($QOSClassPF($CLASSIFIER)('classifier-action-entry-cfg'),'bbf-qos-plc:policing') let $CLASSIFIER_ACTION := $QOSClassPF($CLASSIFIER)('classifier-action-entry-cfg')('bbf-qos-plc:policing')('policing-profile') let $QOSPolicing:=$QOSPolicingPF($CLASSIFIER_ACTION) return if ($QOSPolicing('scope')='bbf-qos-cls:vlan-sub-interface') then $QOSPolicing('cir') else 0) let $SumVenetPolicingCir:=0+sum( for $POLICY_LIST in $QOSProF($p) for $CLASSIFIER in $QOSPolicyPF($POLICY_LIST) where map:contains($QOSClassPF($CLASSIFIER)('classifier-action-entry-cfg'),'bbf-qos-plc:policing') let $CLASSIFIER_ACTION := $QOSClassPF($CLASSIFIER)('classifier-action-entry-cfg')('bbf-qos-plc:policing')('policing-profile') let $QOSPolicing:=$QOSPolicingPF($CLASSIFIER_ACTION) return if ($QOSPolicing('scope')='bbf-qos-cls:ethernet-interface') then $QOSPolicing('cir') else 0) return map:entry ( $p, map:merge (( map:entry('VsiPolicingCir', ($SumVsiPolicingCir)), map:entry('VenetPolicingCir', ($SumVenetPolicingCir)) )) ) ),map{'duplicates':'combine'});

declare variable $MCASTVPN:=map:merge(for $mvpn in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-mgmd:multicast/bbf-mgmd:mgmd/bbf-mgmd:multicast-vpn return map:entry(string ($mvpn/bbf-mgmd:name), map:merge(for $mitf in $mvpn/bbf-mgmd:multicast-interface-to-host return map:entry(string($mitf/bbf-mgmd:name), map:merge((map:entry('vsi', string($mitf/bbf-mgmd:vlan-sub-interface)), map:entry('max-group-number', number($mitf/bbf-mgmd:max-group-number))))))));

declare variable $VSI2MITF:= map:merge((for $mvpn in map:keys($MCASTVPN) for $mitfkey in map:keys(map:get($MCASTVPN, $mvpn)) return map:entry($MCASTVPN($mvpn)($mitfkey)('vsi'),$mitfkey)),map{'duplicates':'combine'});

declare variable $VSI2MVPN:= map:merge((for $mvpnkey in map:keys($MCASTVPN) for $mitfkey in map:keys(map:get($MCASTVPN, $mvpnkey)) return map:entry($MCASTVPN($mvpnkey)($mitfkey)('vsi'),$mvpnkey)),map{'duplicates':'combine'});

ns:xquery.errorMessage: S-VLAN is not in allowed range
Maximum allowed configured GEM port per ONU(VANI) limit of ONU_MAX_GEM exceeded
Maximum allowed configured T-CONT per ONU(VANI) limit of ONU_MAX_TCONT exceeded on slice
Maximum allowed configured VSIs per ONU limit of ONU_MAX_VSI exceeded on slice
Maximum allowed configured N:1 forwarder limit of MAX_NTO1_FWD exceeded on slice
Maximum allowed configured aging time limit of MAX_AGING_TIME exceeded on slice
Maximum allowed configured multicast proxy limit of MAX_MCPXORY exceeded
ns:xquery.xqueryTemplate: declare variable $LOCALMAP external; declare variable $ALLOCMAP :=$LOCALMAP('ALLOCMAP'); count(let $ALLOC := $ALLOCMAP('multicast-proxy-profile') for $MC_PROXY_PROFILE in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-mgmd:multicast/bbf-mgmd:mgmd/bbf-mgmd:multicast-proxy-profile where ($MC_PROXY_PROFILE/bbf-mgmd:name[starts-with(text(),'SLICING_PREFIX~')] or $MC_PROXY_PROFILE/bbf-mgmd:name[text()=$ALLOC]) return $MC_PROXY_PROFILE)>MAX_MCPXORY

ns:xquery.errorMessage: Maximum allowed configured multicast channels limit of MAX_MCCHANNEL exceeded
ns:xquery.xqueryTemplate: declare variable $LOCALMAP external; declare variable $ALLOCMAP :=$LOCALMAP('ALLOCMAP'); count(let $ALLOC := $ALLOCMAP('multicast-vpn') for $MCVPN in /anv:device-manager/adh:device/adh:device-specific-data/bbf-mgmd:multicast/bbf-mgmd:mgmd/bbf-mgmd:multicast-vpn where ($MCVPN/bbf-mgmd:name[starts-with(text(),'SLICING_PREFIX~')] or $MCVPN/bbf-mgmd:name[text()=$ALLOC]) return $MCVPN/bbf-mgmd:multicast-channel/bbf-mgmd:name)>MAX_MCCHANNEL

ns:xquery.errorMessage: Maximum allowed IGMP joins per ONU(VANI) limit of ONU_MAX_IGMP_JOIN exceeded on slice
Maximum allowed configured queue for level 2 scheduler node limit of L2_SCHEDULER_MAX_QUEUE in slice
Maximum allowed configured queue size per ONU(VANI) limit of ONU_MAX_QUEUE_SIZE exceeded on slice
Maximum allowed configured traffic descriptor profile limit of MAX_TDP exceeded on slice
ns:xquery.xqueryTemplate: declare variable $LOCALMAP external; declare variable $TDP:= $LOCALMAP('TDP'); declare variable $ALLOCMAP :=$LOCALMAP('ALLOCMAP'); count(let $ALLOC:=$ALLOCMAP('traffic-descriptor-profile') for $tmp in map:keys($TDP) where (starts-with($tmp,'SLICING_PREFIX~') or $tmp=$ALLOC) return $tmp)>MAX_TDP

ns:xquery.errorMessage: Maximum allowed configured US CIR for Channel Partition 'CHANNEL_PARTITION_NAME' limit of PON_US_MAX_CIR exceeded on slice
Maximum allowed configured US PIR for Channel Partition 'CHANNEL_PARTITION_NAME' limit of PON_US_MAX_PIR exceeded on slice
Lowest configured Jitter Tolerance per TCONT for Channel Partition 'CHANNEL_PARTITION_NAME' limit of PON_JT_TCONT exceeded
Maximum number of TCONTs per ONTs for Channel Partition 'CHANNEL_PARTITION_NAME' limit of PON_ONU_MAX_TCONT exceeded on slice
